ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company in the specified currency */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the company belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the market capitalization is reported */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used in the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the market data belongs to */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company on the given date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the market capitalization is reported */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume on the given date */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the market data */,
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the market data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_market_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the news article is related to */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the market trend belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the market trend belongs to */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the market trend */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market trend was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market trend was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the report is related to */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who wrote the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., Buy, Hold, Sell) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
